title: MC FNaF - SB MC Mod
description: A mod that will help you make FNaF : security breach in minecraft
body:
These mod versions need certain mods to work

versions (old) 1.05 and newer until 1.06 need [geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) to work

Versions (new) needs [player animator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator), along with 1.0.4's update having to use both [player animator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator), and [fusion](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures)

have a view on what this mod has to offer
![everything in this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/331048120890c07a2630bdc8db99087e3a7d18b8.png)

If you are using the mod/client ["OptiFine"](https://optifine.net/home) please note that it is compatible with this mod

Has only up to some blocks/models from the lobby, daycare, & some of Rockstar Row. The photobooth from version 1.0.3 and newer needs a barrier or an invisible block beneath it


this does have an RTX feature too, so even if your computer doesn't support it, it will still work

If you are making a map with this, please credit this mod for this page.

This will help with your map-making

has the lobby floor, everything (almost to do with the vents), posters such as the elevator posters that you see, music discs, tiles, carpets, and more

When in control, go to Misc. And go to Freddy Overlay to change the key binding.

Warning: Freddy does play a very sad song when he dies, and if you use the overlay for Freddy,

we do have an open beta that everyone can use 

[https://modrinth.com/mod/security-breach-objects,-blocks,-more-open-beta](https://modrinth.com/mod/security-breach-objects,-blocks,-more-open-beta)

You can donate through this link

https://ko-fi.com/securitybreachobjectsblocksetc
